text:
Clone (, rom. Kurōn) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows for a player to change a card of their choice into a random card from the restricted slots of the target.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Purchasable at the Spell Card Shop in Masadora.

Summary

This spell allows the user to transform this card into a random one from the target's restricted slots, provided the target card has not reached its conversion limit. The cloned card retains the same abilities as the original. It also allows the cloned card to be placed in any restricted card slot, providing that it matched the designated slot number of the original card the clone was based on. The card is destroyed if placed in an incorrect slot. Any player who views the caster's card list will see the cloned copy, which is undistinguishable from the original. Cloned cards do count as the original and can be used instead of the original, so somebody using a cloned card doesn't need the original to complete the game. The cloned card will only revert if the original user wants it too, or if a Paladin's Necklace is used. It is commonly used in trades or to establish monopolies.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1011 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名の指定ポケットカードからランダムに１枚選び、そのカードに変身する。

(対象プレイヤーの指定ポケットにカードが１枚もない場合と変化後のカード化限界枚数がMAXだった場合は変化せず、「複製」は破壊される。)
|-
![Eng]
|No.1011 :: Clone 
A randomly selected card from 1 target player's designated slot cards, this card will transform into it.
|}

Trivia

The Viz translation swapped the name of this card with "Mimic" for unknown reasons.
The Bombers used "Clone" to establish a monopoly of "Angel's Breath", as revealed in Chapter 152.
